transcript:
Speaker A: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದೀರಾ? [What are you doing?] 
Speaker B: I am fan repairing. 
Speaker C: Haha... "I am fan repairing" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I am repairing a fan" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Haha... Not "I am fan repairing", you should say "I am repairing a fan".] 
Speaker A: ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಯೋದು? [Then how do I learn English?] 
Speaker C: ತುಂಬಾ easy. ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ ಜಸ್ಟ್ 15 min ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. ತುಂಬಾ ಬೇಗ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ fluently ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀರಾ. [Very easy. Just practice with me for 15 minutes every day. You will speak English fluently very quickly.] 
Speaker A: ಆದ್ರೆ ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತಾ? [But will this cost a lot?] 
Speaker C: ಇಲ್ಲ ಇಲ್ಲ... ಕೇವಲ 1 rupee ಗೆ ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. 1 crores+ ಜನರು ಈಗಾಗಲೇ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [No, no... You can try this app completely for just 1 rupee. Over 1 crore+ people are already learning English with me.] 
Speaker A: ಸೂಪರ್, ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು? [Super, how to join?] 
Speaker C: ಈಗಾಗಲೇ MySivi app ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋದು ಇವತ್ತೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Download the MySivi app now and start learning English today.] 
Speaker D: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text:

15 MIN
ಸಾಕು [Enough]
ತುಂಬಾ ಬೇಗ ENGLISH [Very fast ENGLISH]
FLUENTLY ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀರಾ [Will speak FLUENTLY]
ಖರ್ಚು [Expense]

1 Rupee

ಕಲಿಯೋದು [Learning]

MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: The ad hooks viewers with a humorous English grammar correction of a man repairing a fan. It promotes the MySivi app as an easy, affordable way to learn fluent English with an AI tutor for just 1 Rupee. The call to action urges users to download the app and start learning today.
